fusion: matmul_ffn_gate_up_silu override: gate/up enqueue x2 -> drain x1 (FastRPC dispatch floor 2->1 per layer, 28 layers)

correctness.q4_16tok: batch ON == CPU == batch OFF : 16/16 identical (first=12095, '...Paris. It has a population of about 2 million people and covers an area')
correctness.f16_16tok: batch ON == batch OFF : 16/16 identical (first=12095, '...Paris. The capital of Italy is Rome. What's the capital city of Spain')
correctness.batch_path_confirmed: [htp] gate/up batch dispatch 활성 log count: ON=1, OFF=0 (env toggle + 경로 실행 확증)

narrative: Floor recovery, not a CPU-beating speedup: HTP ON (q4 78.9 / f16 110.2) still > CPU (q4 33.1 / f16 64.3). fusion removes one FastRPC dispatch floor (~3-4 ms/tok across 28 layers); absolute saving ~constant across dtype (op-count-based, not size-based).
